steps.title: Identify the task the question requires
steps.content: The question asks which choice explains advantages of onshore wind farms over offshore ones. From the notes, the defining advantage is cost: offshore farms are more expensive to build and maintain than onshore farms.

steps.title: Match the task to the choice that effectively accomplishes it
steps.content:
Choice A directly synthesizes this advantage by highlighting the cost benefit while acknowledging the electricity output trade-off, effectively explaining why onshore farms are preferable.

Choices B, C, and D either isolate facts unrelated to the comparison (B and C), or explicitly treat the two types as equivalent without identifying any advantages (D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
